Modules.title: What do you want to monitor?
Modules.subtitle: Select which monitor you want to analyze

monitor-de-seca-ana.title: Drought Monitor | ANA
monitor-de-seca-ana.description: Monitors the drought situation in Brazil based on the official monthly classification from the Drought Monitor.

indice-integrado-de-secas.title: Integrated Drought Index
indice-integrado-de-secas.description: Indicates the accumulated drought over 6 months (IIS6) based on integrated climate and vegetation indicators.

cdi.title: CDI
cdi.description: Monitors the stages of drought monthly based on the Composite Drought Index (CDI).

Analysis.unavailableDescriptionLoading: Municipal data for this layer is being loaded on demand.
Analysis.unavailableDescription: Analysis data for {location} is not yet available in this module.
